dialog.stepLabel: Lorenzo: "That's all the graffiti Chalulu wanted you to see. Let's mee..."

items.speaker: Lorenzo
items.text: That's all the graffiti Chalulu wanted you to see. Let's meet at the usual place, {PlayerName}.

dialog.stepLabel: Meet Lorenzo at the usual place

items.speaker: Lorenzo
items.text: What kind of role do you imagine Painter plays in the "Night Reveries"?

options.text: A villain who clashes with the knight.

items.speaker: Lorenzo
items.text: Glad we agree on that. Painter here is the classic villain in this story.

items.speaker: Lorenzo
items.text: Turns out the Cuddle Wuddle that plays the giant's underling is Painter himself...

items.speaker: Lorenzo
items.text: Well… I was lucky enough to catch a glimpse of the "Night Reveries."

items.speaker: Lorenzo
items.text: A valiant knight, an evil giant, and a crazed, cunning underling. The Echoes played their part so vividly. It all felt real.

items.speaker: Lorenzo
items.text: Eventually, as the first light of dawn broke, the knight felled the giant and his cursed underling. The Echoes then escorted the knight out of the town in cheers.

items.speaker: Lorenzo
items.text: But in a shadowed corner, the "felled" underling slowly rose, fumbling to remove his simple costume. Beneath it was no crazed minion—just a large, lonely Cuddle Wuddle.

items.speaker: Lorenzo
items.text: Through tireless practice, day in and day out, Painter mastered the role of the villain, so convincingly that even the Mad Knight was fooled, believing he faced the true underling.

items.speaker: Lorenzo
items.text: However, flowers, applause, and cheers... are never meant for those who play the villains.

items.speaker: Lorenzo
items.text: "If I could be the knight, the hero, would they cheer for me, too?"

items.speaker: Lorenzo
items.text: Troubled by these thoughts, the Cuddle Wuddle picked up a brush and painted his feelings.

items.speaker: Lorenzo
items.text: The desire to play the knight and become the hero is but a reflection of something deeper. So, tell me, {PlayerName}, what do you think the Cuddle Wuddle truly wants?

items.speaker: Lorenzo
items.text: And maybe a heartfelt "Your performance was brilliant."

items.speaker: Lorenzo
items.text: {PlayerName}, would you help me find our dear Painter?

options.text: We'll find him and shower him with compliments.
